name: Nord
description: The hardy, fair-haired people of Skyrim. Known for their fierce warriors and natural resistance to frost.
racialAbility: Battle Cry: Nearby enemies flee for 30 seconds (once per day)

name: Imperial
description: The civilized people of Cyrodiil. Skilled diplomats and versatile warriors.
racialAbility: Voice of the Emperor: Calms nearby people for 60 seconds (once per day)

name: Breton
description: The magic-touched people of High Rock. Natural spellcasters with innate magic resistance.
racialAbility: Dragonskin: Absorb 50% of incoming spells for 60 seconds (once per day)

name: Dunmer (Dark Elf)
description: The dark-skinned elves of Morrowind. Skilled in stealth and destruction magic, with natural fire resistance.
racialAbility: Ancestor's Wrath: Cloak of flames that damages nearby enemies (once per day)

name: Altmer (High Elf)
description: The tall, golden-skinned elves of the Summerset Isles. The most magically gifted of all races.
racialAbility: Highborn: Regenerate magicka faster for 60 seconds (once per day)

name: Bosmer (Wood Elf)
description: The nimble forest-dwellers of Valenwood. Unmatched archers and scouts.
racialAbility: Command Animal: Make an animal an ally for 60 seconds (once per day)

name: Orc (Orsimer)
description: The pariah folk of the Wrothgarian Mountains. The fiercest warriors in all of Tamriel.
racialAbility: Berserker Rage: Double damage dealt, half damage taken for 60 seconds (once per day)

name: Redguard
description: The dark-skinned warriors of Hammerfell. The most naturally talented warriors in Tamriel.
racialAbility: Adrenaline Rush: Stamina regenerates 10x faster for 60 seconds (once per day)

name: Khajiit
description: The feline people of Elsweyr. Quick, clever, and gifted in stealth and hand-to-hand combat.
racialAbility: Night Eye: See in the dark for 60 seconds (unlimited uses)

name: Argonian
description: The reptilian people of Black Marsh. Resistant to disease and poison, and capable of breathing underwater.
racialAbility: Histskin: Rapidly regenerate health for 60 seconds (once per day)
